in-app-browser-links: Use in-app browser to open links
enable-trending-videos-discover-feed: Enable trending videos in your Discover feed
clear-all-storage-data: Clear all storage data (restart after this)
external-media-collection-notice: External media may allow websites to collect information about you and your device. No information is sent or requested until you press the "play" button.
experimental-notification-preference: <0>Experimental:</0> When this preference is enabled, you'll only receive reply and quote notifications from users you follow. We'll continue to add more controls here over time.
following-feed-settings: These settings only apply to the Following feed.
show-saved-feeds-samples: Show samples of your saved feeds in your Following feed
bluesky-visibility-note: Note: Bluesky is an open and public network. This setting only limits the visibility of your content on the Bluesky app and website, and other apps may not respect this setting. Your content may still be shown to logged-out users by other apps and websites.
learn-more-public-content: Learn more about what is public on Bluesky.
sort-replies-by-post: Sort replies to the same post by:
show-replies-by-followed-people: Show replies by people you follow before all other replies
autoplay-options-moved-to-settings: Autoplay options have moved to the <0>Content and Media settings</0> .
app-passwords-description: Use app passwords to sign in to other Bluesky clients without giving full access to your account or password.
select-app-language-description: Select your app language for the default text to display in the app.
select-preferred-language-description: Select your preferred language for translations in your feed.
select-subscribed-languages-description: Select which languages you want your subscribed feeds to include. If none are selected, all languages will be shown.
